titleEn: MilkingMilk in the tank with less effort
titleZh: 更省力地将牛奶存入储奶罐——自动挤奶系统如何优化奶牛福利与生产效率
summaryZh: 本文介绍了Lely自动挤奶系统的核心理念：通过自由牛流、个体化治疗、健康优化和牛奶精细处理，实现“控制输入、优化输出”。文章强调自动挤奶不仅是效率工具，更是对牧场主直觉和行动的映射，让奶牛自主决定采食、休息和挤奶时间，从而提升福利、延长生产寿命。同时，文章还探讨了选择性干奶牛治疗与机器人挤奶结合放牧的实践挑战与机遇，为智慧畜牧从业者提供了从技术到管理的全面参考。
featuredReason: 本文深入解析了自动挤奶系统在智慧畜牧中的核心价值，特别是自由牛流、个体化治疗与健康优化如何通过IoT和机器人技术实现，同时探讨了放牧与机器人结合的实践挑战，为牧场数字化转型提供了切实可行的思路。
contentFull: Solutions overviewMilking solutionsMilk in the tank with less effortFree cow trafficOptimise cow healthIndividual treatmentDiscover our milking robotExploreINTRODUCTIONControl the input, optimize the outputYour farm is a unique ecosystem, and you understand its intricacies better than anyone else. The same goes for your cows – their habits, preferences, and individual nuances are second nature to you. That’s precisely what you can expect from an automatic milking system: it’s not only about efficiency; it’s about mirroring your instincts and actions. Control the input, optimize the outputCow freedom of choiceProvide the cows with a stress-free environment with peace and quiet that allows hem to express their natural behaviour.Individual treatmentEvery cow and even every one of her teats is unique and, therefore, needs to be treated individually. Optimise cow healthCow performance is optimised when cows are healthy. Health requirements must be met.Handle milk with careMilk is a valuable but perishable commodity and needs to be handled with care to maintain the quality.Milking products overviewAutomatic milking robotLely Astronaut A5 NextAutomatic milking solution for large dairy farmsAstronaut MaxLarge farmingDairy XLVideoHow free cow traffic worksWith free cow traffic, the cow decides when she eats, drinks, lies down and is milked. This improves her wellbeing. By taking care of our cows and putting extra effort into cow comfort, we are able to extend lifetime and milk production.ArticlesFarming insightsMilking5/28/2026How the Lely MQC-C supports selective dry cow therapyThe dry period plays a crucial role in the health and productivity of dairy cows. It allows the udder to recover from the previous lactation and prepares the cow for a successful start of the next one. At the same time, it is a key moment to reduce the risk of mastitis and udder infection in early lactation. In recent years, dairy farming has moved towards a more targeted approach: selective dry cow therapy. Instead of treating all cows with antibiotics at dry off, treatment decisions are based on individual cow health. Accurate and timely insight into somatic cell count (SCC) is essential for this approach.Milking4/7/2026Grazing with a milking robot: challenge or opportunity?Grazing plays an important role in dairy farming in many regions, especially when cows return to pasture in spring. At the same time, many farms already work with automatic milking systems. For robot farmers, combining grazing with a milking robot often raises a fundamental question: does grazing become a challenge, or can it turn into an opportunity? In a robotic milking system, cows decide for themselves when to be milked, following their own rhythm throughout the day. Introducing grazing changes cow motivation and movement, which can influence how often cows visit the robot. This is why grazing and robotic milking are often seen as a difficult combination. In practice, grazing can work well with a milking robot under the right conditions. Understanding how cows balance eating, resting and milking, and how grazing influences that balance, is key to maintaining milk production, cow health and smooth farm operations during the grazing season.Milking4/1/2026The evolution of robotic milkingFor more than three decades, robotic milking has changed the way dairy farms operate. What began as an idea to reduce physical labour has grown into a smart system that supports farmers, cows, and long-term farm performance. Early robotic systems were designed to solve one key challenge: how to milk cows safely and consistently without direct human involvement. Over time, these systems developed into reliable, data-driven tools that support free cow traffic, flexible working hours, and healthier herds. Today, robotic milking is not only about efficiency. It is about creating a barn environment where cows can follow their natural rhythm, farmers gain insight from the data, and daily work becomes more sustainable and future-proof.Milking4/1/2026Continuous development of the automatic milking robotAutomatic milking technology has transformed dairy farming, but the journey is far from finished at Lely. The continuous development of the automatic milking system is at the heart of our innovation strategy. The Lely Astronaut continues to evolve year after year, driven by new knowledge, new technology and the daily challenges on farms. On the outside, the Lely Astronaut may look similar, but on the inside improvements are made every single year to keep our solution sustainable, profitable and enjoyable to work with. This proves that robotic milking is not a fixed product, but a continuously developing solution built to support farmers today and in the future.ResourcesBrochuresBrochureAstronaut A5 NextDownload the Astronaut brochureDownloadBrochureAstronaut MaxDownload the Astronaut Max brochureDownloadBrochureDairy XLDownload the Dairy XL brochureDownloadBrochureMeteorDownload the Meteor brochureDownloadSee all resourcesWhy our solutions?Our solutions contribute to more than just high-quality milk. They offer freedom of choice and flexibility and contribute to the well-being of you and your cows. From machines to software and new innovations, we have many options. Contact one of our Lely Centers for advice.Get free advice
translationZh:
解决方案概述

挤奶解决方案

**更省力地将牛奶存入储奶罐**

自由牛流

优化奶牛健康

个体化治疗

探索我们的挤奶机器人

简介

**控制输入，优化输出**

您的牧场是一个独特的生态系统，您比任何人都更了解它的复杂性。您的奶牛也是如此——它们的习惯、偏好和个体细微差别对您来说如同本能。这正是您可以从自动挤奶系统中获得的：它不仅仅是关于效率；更是关于映射您的直觉和行动。

控制输入，优化输出

**奶牛自由选择**

为奶牛提供一个无压力的环境，让它们能够安静平和地表达自然行为。

**个体化治疗**

每头奶牛，甚至它的每个乳头都是独一无二的，因此需要个体化对待。

**优化奶牛健康**

当奶牛健康时，其生产性能才能达到最优。必须满足健康要求。

**小心处理牛奶**

牛奶是一种有价值但易腐烂的商品，需要小心处理以保持质量。

挤奶产品概述

自动挤奶机器人

Lely Astronaut A5 Next

适用于大型牧场的自动挤奶解决方案

Astronaut Max

大型牧场

Dairy XL

视频

**自由牛流如何运作**

在自由牛流模式下，奶牛自行决定何时采食、饮水、躺卧和挤奶。这改善了它们的福利。通过照顾奶牛并额外关注奶牛舒适度，我们能够延长生产寿命并提高产奶量。

文章

牧场洞察

挤奶

2026年5月28日

**Lely MQC-C如何支持选择性干奶牛治疗**

干奶期对奶牛的健康和生产力起着至关重要的作用。它让乳房从前一个泌乳期恢复过来，并为奶牛成功开始下一个泌乳期做好准备。同时，这也是降低早期泌乳期乳腺炎和乳房感染风险的关键时刻。近年来，奶牛养殖已转向更具针对性的方法：选择性干奶牛治疗。这种方法不是在干奶时对所有奶牛使用抗生素，而是根据个体奶牛的健康状况做出治疗决定。准确及时地了解体细胞计数对于这种方法至关重要。

挤奶

2026年4月7日

**使用挤奶机器人放牧：挑战还是机遇？**

在许多地区，放牧在奶牛养殖中扮演着重要角色，尤其是在春季奶牛返回牧场时。与此同时，许多牧场已经在使用自动挤奶系统。对于使用机器人的牧场主来说，将放牧与挤奶机器人结合常常引发一个根本性问题：放牧是成为挑战，还是可以转化为机遇？在机器人挤奶系统中，奶牛自行决定何时挤奶，遵循自己的节奏全天活动。引入放牧会改变奶牛的动机和运动模式，从而影响它们访问机器人的频率。这就是为什么放牧和机器人挤奶常被视为难以结合的原因。在实践中，放牧可以与挤奶机器人很好地配合。
